description: Get hanger when dryer finishes for Sophie's jacket

cues.visual: Natural wood hanger with wide curved shoulders

element2.creation_context: Sophie's jacket has been in the dryer since it got wet last visit

element3.detected_activity_raw: User is flipping steak on pan #3

encoding_info.encoding_text: Sophie's jacket has been in the dryer since it got wet last visit. When the dryer finishes, go to the study and get a hanger from the closet, left side — the wooden hanger with wide shoulders. Hang the jacket on it in the living room.

distractors.description: Wooden hanger with wide shoulders, no trouser bar
Wooden hanger with narrow shoulders, with trouser bar

distractor_info.target_unique_conjunction: wide shoulders + with bar — only the target has both
